docs.title: Ontology for Traffic Regulations
docs.text:
A reason justifying the existence of the instance of the class

This ontology consists of the following patterns:

  • Tro Pattern (itsRegulation)

The ontology also contains the following classes that are not assigned to any pattern:

  • Tro Pattern (itsRegulation)

The formal definition of these patterns is available in TTL Syntax.

docs.title: LegalBasis
docs.text:
A legal basis provides references to the legal documents that authorize an entity to issue the types of regulations covered by a traffic regulation order.

Open interactive LegalBasis diagram

docs.title: Formalization for LegalBasis
docs.text: Property Constraint date all xsd::date date max 1 owl::Thing genProp::hasName exactly 1 owl::Thing genProp::hasName all xsd::string subClassOf TroThing version all xsd::string version max 1 owl::Thing

docs.title: Used by classes
docs.text: Class Property Traffic Regulation Order legalBasis

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Annotation Value xsd::pattern TroPattern

docs.title: RuleMaker
docs.text:
A rule maker is an entity that has the responsibility for creating and maintaining rules of the road or regulations for a geographic and operational scope as defined by the parent jurisdictional entity.

Open interactive RuleMaker diagram

docs.title: Formalization for RuleMaker
docs.text: Property Constraint legalBasis max 1 owl::Thing subClassOf TroThing

docs.title: Used by classes
docs.text: Class Property Traffic Regulation Order issuingAuthority

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Annotation Value xsd::pattern TroPattern

docs.title: TrafficRegulation
docs.text:
A traffic regulation is a rule having the force of law that is established by a regulator through a traffic regulation order.

Open interactive TrafficRegulation diagram

docs.title: Formalization for TrafficRegulation
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf TroThing

docs.title: Used by classes
docs.text: Class Property Traffic Regulation Order trafficRegulation

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Annotation Value xsd::pattern TroPattern

docs.title: TrafficRegulationOrder
docs.text:
A TrafficRegulation Order is a legally recognised document that specifies one or more traffic regulations.

Open interactive TrafficRegulationOrder diagram

docs.title: Formalization for TrafficRegulationOrder
docs.text: Property Constraint genProp::hasDescription all xsd::string genProp::hasDescription max 1 owl::Thing genProp::hasIdentifier all xsd::string genProp::hasIdentifier exactly 1 owl::Thing implementedValidity max 1 owl::Thing implementedValidity all its-time::Validity issuingAuthority all RuleMaker issuingAuthority exactly 1 owl::Thing legalBasis all LegalBasis legalBasis max 1 owl::Thing reasonCode all code::Code status exactly 1 owl::Thing status all code::Code subClassOf TroThing trafficRegulation all TrafficRegulation trafficRegulation min 1 owl::Thing validityByOrder max 1 owl::Thing validityByOrder all its-time::Validity

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Annotation Value xsd::pattern TroPattern

docs.title: Tro Pattern
docs.text:
It consists of the following classes:

  • Legal Basis
  • Rule Maker
  • Traffic Regulation
  • Traffic Regulation Order
  • Tro Thing

docs.title: TroThing
docs.text: Open interactive TroThing diagram

docs.title: Specializations of TroThing
docs.text: Class Description Legal Basis A legal basis provides references to the legal documents that authorize an entity to issue the types of regulations covered by a traffic regulation order. Rule Maker A rule maker is an entity that has the responsibility for creating and maintaining rules of the road or regulations for a geographic and operational scope as defined by the parent jurisdictional entity. Traffic Regulation A traffic regulation is a rule having the force of law that is established by a regulator through a traffic regulation order. Traffic Regulation Order A TrafficRegulation Order is a legally recognised document that specifies one or more traffic regulations.

docs.title: Formalization for TroThing
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf transportnetwork::ITSThing

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Annotation Value xsd::pattern TroPattern
